metadata.title: Hotel | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered hotel management platform for all your hospitality operations — from online booking management and room planning to invoicing and guest services.

hero.title: your Hotel
hero.description: From online booking to check-out, AdonERP brings every part of your hotel operations into one seamless system.
hero.testimonialQuote: With AdonERP, restaurant and hotel results are visible in real time. It helps improve costs, monitor KPIs, manage shifts and keep budget control reliable.

cards.builder: Create a website using AdonERP's AI-based builder, add photos, drag and drop elements, and improve search visibility.
cards.listing: List room availability, details and rates, then allow clients to make reservations online.

planningSection.title: Save time,
planningSection.description: Manage planning, bookings, modifications, room upgrades and extra services from one integrated calendar.

operationsSection.title: Guest-centric
operationsSection.description: Run easy check-in and check-out, add breakfast or activity services, and collect guest information whenever required.

invoicingSection.title: Flexible
invoicingSection.description: Generate professional invoices in one click and accept multiple payment methods. Perfect for corporate clients and direct bookings.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Everything needed to manage hotel bookings, rooms, payments, planning and guest services all in one place.

list.title: Online booking management
list.description: Accept reservations directly from your website with real-time availability.

list.title: Integrated sales and rental
list.description: Sell additional services and manage room rentals from one platform.

list.title: City tax
list.description: Automatically calculate and apply local city taxes to guest invoices.

list.title: Flexible invoicing
list.description: Generate professional invoices for individuals and corporate clients.

list.title: Streamlined planning
list.description: Manage room availability, check-ins, and check-outs from a single calendar.

list.title: Payment providers
list.description: Accept multiple payment methods including cards and digital wallets.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your hotel operation, booking management, and guest services.

testimonials.name: Isabelle Moreau
testimonials.content: With AdonERP, restaurant and hotel results are visible in real time. It helps improve costs, monitor KPIs, manage shifts and keep budget control reliable.

testimonials.name: David Thompson
testimonials.content: The online booking system and integrated planning tools transformed our hotel operations. We now manage everything from one dashboard, and our guests love the seamless experience.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for hotels and hospitality.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a hotel management workflow that helps you maximize bookings, streamline operations, and create memorable guest experiences.
